creator: jhell@DataIX.net
text:
While viewing the website with a font size greater than 14 the menu becomes obscured and drops to below the grey menu place holder.

http://awesomescreenshot.com/0dcczpqdd

Fix: 

Adjust menu fonts for a static size.
How-To-Repeat: In firefox 3x - 4x possibly more:
Using fonts for Western

Adjust sise for proportional to >= 15
                monospace to >= 14

Adjust minimum size to >= 14
